name: Free-Form Apple Tart
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Refrigerated pie crusts - ready to bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Let pie crusts stand at room temperature as package label directs. Unfold and overlap by 4 inch to form an oval. On a floured work surface, roll with a rolling pin to join; roll to a 19x22 inch oval. Drape over the rolling pin and transfer to a large baking sheet. (The oval will be too long for the sheet, but the edges will be folded up for baking.)
2. Preheat oven to 425°F. Peel apples and core, leaving them whole. Thinly slice crosswise; arrange in overlapping rows on the pastry, leaving a 1-inch pastry border. Fold the border over the apples, pressing gently. In a small bowl, combine sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over apples.
3. Bake for 40 minutes or until the pastry is well-browned on the bottom. In a saucepan over low heat, melt the jam. Spread warm jam over the apples.
